options.name: -detailed
options.description: Generates a report containing the specified information for all nets, including those with no violations

options.name: -limit
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of error messages to report

options.name: -no_max_float_area
options.description: Specifies disable verifying the max floating area violation

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file. The file can contain PAE violation information

options.name: -use
options.description: {all | signal | power | clock | analog} Specifies what kind of net to be checked
